top_signals.title: Dozens feared trapped after building collapses in Philippines
top_signals.summary: Around 30 to 40 people ⁠are feared trapped after a nine-story building under construction collapsed in Angeles City, north of the Philippine capital, a city official said Sunday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: California seeks novel solution as chemical tank heats up, risking catastrophe
top_signals.summary: Evacuation orders remained in place for an area covering tens of thousands of people in the Garden Grove suburb ​of Los Angeles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Netherlands seizes 800 servers of hosting firm enabling cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: Financial crime investigators in the Netherlands (FIOD) arrested two men and seized 800 servers linked to a web hosting company that enabled cyberattacks, interference operations, and disinformation campaigns. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
